title: calea kingii
intro: Calea kingii, also known as Mexican feathergrass or Cloud Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calea kingii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. Calea kingii is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used in the form of teas, capsules, or topical creams, allowing for a range of herbal preparations.
